field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: Using a mixture of 15.7/ 84.3 (A/B, v/v) “critical” separation conditions were realized.
field_evidence.critical_component: For the determination of critical conditions of adsorption of PEO, an ethoxylated fatty acid C 18 alcohol ( M w ) 700 g/mol) was used.
field_evidence.column_name: The system was equipped with one BEH (Bridged Ethane Hybrid particle) C18 column with a length of 50 mm and a diameter of 2.1 mm (Waters GmbH).
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: Different binary and ternary solvent mixtures were used as mobile phase. The determination of critical conditions of adsorption of PEO and the characterization of different PEO ′ s was performed using mixtures of water with 0.1% of formic acid (component A) and acetonitrile/methanol 30:70 (v/v) (component B).
field_evidence.mobile_phase_ratio: Using a mixture of 15.7/ 84.3 (A/B, v/v) “critical” separation conditions were realized.
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: Column and autosampler were kept at a constant temperature of 30 ° C.

conditions.physical_address: BAM, Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing, Richard-Willstaetter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: At a solvent composition of 85:15 THF/water (v/v), which represents the “critical” mode of separation of PPO (middle), the PPO/PEO copolymer was injected.
field_evidence.critical_component: For the determination of critical conditions of PPO and PPO/PEO copolymers, mixtures of water with 0.2% of formic acid (A) and tetrahydrofurane (B) were used.
field_evidence.column_name: The system was equipped with one BEH (Bridged Ethane Hybrid particle) C18 column with a length of 50 mm and a diameter of 2.1 mm (Waters GmbH).
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: For the determination of critical conditions of PPO and PPO/PEO copolymers, mixtures of water with 0.2% of formic acid (A) and tetrahydrofurane (B) were used.
field_evidence.mobile_phase_ratio: At a solvent composition of 85:15 THF/water (v/v), which represents the “critical” mode of separation of PPO (middle), the PPO/PEO copolymer was injected.
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: Column and autosampler were kept at a constant temperature of 30 ° C.
field_evidence.flow_rate: At a flow rate of 0.5 mL/min only after 0.35 min a complete elution could be observed.

conditions.physical_address: BAM, Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing, Richard-Willstaetter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany
